PRESS RELEASE
World Bank Group Launches Initiative to Improve Water Security for 1 Billion People

The World Bank Group, in partnership with multilateral development banks, development finance institutions and key partners, today launched Water Forward, a global platform to help improve water security for 1 billion people by 2030.
